prompt: A high-tech, futuristic Apple advertisement with the bold glowing text "SHOT ON THE FUTURE" in the background. In the center, a stylish young woman with a confident smile is sitting on the hood of a sleek, silver futuristic sports car. She is holding a large, metallic "Titanium Orange" iPhone 17 Pro close to the camera, showing off its back and advanced camera lenses.\nShe is wearing a trendy, matching orange monochrome outfit, including an orange hoodie, cargo pants, and orange sneakers with a silver swoosh. The background features a glowing neon Apple logo and orange-tinted holographic tech UI displays. The entire scene has a cinematic, vibrant orange and silver color palette with sharp focus and hyper-realistic details.
